prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SNAPATITE-607B Product Type: FLATWARE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Eating Utensil 4in1 Camping Multitool Spoon Fork Knife Bottle Opener Description: The ASR Outdoor 4 in 1 Camping Utensil is lightweight, compact, and convenient to store and use on-the-go. Each utensil has a versatile design and features a spoon, knife, fork, and bottle opener, so you can scoop, cut, poke, and pop.

Save space and overcome the challenge of packing several utensils on your family trip. Our TSA-compliant and eco-friendly 4-in-1 utensil set comes in different colors and features a detachable sturdy spear-point style eating knife sheathed inside the fork's handle.

The colors include olive green, light grey, blue-grey, and black. Search Terms: camping utensil outdoor accessories gear stove cookware eating open fire cooking camp light portable table campng flatware eatting plates backpacking spoon knife spork survival roasting marshmello set Features: - 4 in 1 FEATURES - Eco Friendly set contains a fork, knife, spoon and bottle opener - SMALL AND LIGHTWEIGHT - Take it with you wherever you go. Easily store in a pocket, backpack, or purse. Easily (and safely) handled by adults and children alike. - SAFE AND EASY TO CLEAN - BPA free to protect the health of you and your loved ones. Dishwasher safe. - MANY USES - Biking, Emergency Preparedness, Picnic, Prospecting, Zombie Apocalypse, EDC, Hunting, Backpacking, Bug out Bag, and any other adventure === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-in-1 Camping Multitool Utensil Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Fork, Knife, Spoon, Bottle Opener, Lightweight, Compact, TSA-Compliant, Eco-Friendly, Dishwasher Safe, BPA-Free

openai.title_differentiation: Fork, Knife, Spoon And Bottle Opener, Lightweight, BPA Free, Dishwasher Safe, TSA Compliant, Detachable Blade
